content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama Monthly Report (April 2026)

## 🚀 Highlights
Development activity for April 2026 was focused on identifying and addressing critical infrastructure challenges within the project's distribution pipeline. The primary focus centered on a packaging regression that impacted the installation process for users. No new features or refactoring efforts were completed during this period as the team prioritized resolving these foundational deployment issues.

## 🛠️ Key Developments
There were no new features, bug fixes, or refactoring efforts completed during this period. Development efforts were exclusively dedicated to the investigation of packaging errors affecting the project's installation lifecycle.

## 🐛 Issues & Triage
### New & Active Issues
*   **Packaging and Installation:** The primary focus of the month was the identification of issue [#22](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-ollama/issues/22). This issue highlights a failure in the `postinstall` script caused by the absence of `scripts/install-ollama.js` in the published tarball. This represents a significant blocker for users attempting to install the plugin, as it prevents the successful execution of the installation process.

### Closed Issues
*   No issues were closed during the month of April 2026.

## 💬 Community & Collaboration
Activity during this period was limited to the reporting of the packaging issue. There were no pull requests opened or closed, and no significant community discussions or collaborative efforts were recorded in the provided data for this month.
